root.rep_text: แบบรายงานที่ 8 - แบบรายงานการดำรงสินทรัพย์สภาพคล่อง
root.sql: select td.rowx, td.operate_date, (select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '101') as coll_1, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '201'),0) as coll_2_1, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '202'),0) as coll_2_2, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '301'),0) as coll_3, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '401'),0) as coll_4_1, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '402'),0) as coll_4_2, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '501'),0) as coll_5, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '601'),0) as coll_6, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '701'),0) as coll_7, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '801'),0) as coll_8, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = '901'),0) as coll_9 from ( select level as rowx, pka.to_date(level||'/'!month!'/'!year!'') as operate_date from generate_series(1, extract(day from (date_trunc('month', pka.to_date('1/'!month!'/'!year!'')) + interval '1 month' - interval '1 day'))::int) as level ) td where 1=1 /*WHERE*/
